home.title: [EN] Tam Viet Dojo — Learn karate, live with discipline
home.description: [EN] Premier karate dojo in Ho Chi Minh City with over 15 years of experience. Train body, forge spirit, master technique.

hero.headline: [EN] Martial arts is
hero.subline: [EN] At Tam Viet Dojo, we teach karate as a path — training the body, forging the mind, building resilience.

mission.title: [EN] About Tam Viet Dojo
paragraphs: [EN] Tam Viet Dojo was founded in 2010 with the mission to pass on the essence of traditional karate to the next generation.
[EN] We believe martial arts is not just self-defence — it is a journey of holistic development encompassing the physical, mental, and ethical dimensions of a person.

cta.headline: [EN] Begin your journey
cta.paragraph: [EN] Register for a free trial class and discover the path of martial arts at Tam Viet.

about.title: [EN] About — Tam Viet Dojo
about.description: [EN] Discover the 15-year journey of building and developing Tam Viet Dojo — where karate meets martial philosophy.

hero.headline: [EN] Our martial arts journey
hero.subline: [EN] 15 years dedicated to training and inspiring thousands of practitioners.

mission.title: [EN] Our mission
paragraphs: [EN] Tam Viet Dojo is built on three values: Shin (spirit), Tai (body), and Waza (technique). We do not just teach karate — we develop people.
[EN] With over 15 years of activity, we are proud to have contributed to the growth of the karate movement in Vietnam and inspired thousands of students.

items.title: [EN] Dojo founded
items.description: [EN] Master Nguyen Van Viet founded Tam Viet Dojo with 20 founding students in Thu Duc, Ho Chi Minh City.

items.title: [EN] First national medal
items.description: [EN] The first Tam Viet student won a medal at the National Karate Championship, confirming the quality of training.

items.title: [EN] Expansion
items.description: [EN] A second training location was opened to meet the growing needs of the student community.

items.title: [EN] 1,000 black belt students
items.description: [EN] The milestone of 1,000 students achieving black belt under Tam Viet Dojo's training programme.

items.title: [EN] WKF certification
items.description: [EN] Recognised by the World Karate Federation as an internationally accredited training centre.

cta.headline: [EN] Ready to begin?
cta.paragraph: [EN] Join the Tam Viet community and start your martial arts journey today.
